info: Fertilization begins. The sperm meets the egg and forms a zygote.
tips: Take prenatal vitamins and maintain a healthy diet.

info: The embryo begins developing. Cells start forming essential organs.
tips: Focus on hydration and gentle exercise.

info: Hormones start increasing. Implantation occurs in the uterus.
tips: Rest well and avoid alcohol and smoking.

info: Final preparations for birth. Baby fully developed.
tips: Prepare your hospital bag and finalize birth plan.
